name: Carmelized Carnitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into 1-inch cubes.
2. Combine brown sugar, tequila, molasses, salt, pepper, and garlic in a bowl.
3. Add water to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Rub the marinade over the pork cubes, ensuring they are evenly coated.
5. Let the marinated pork sit for at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. In a hot pan, cook the pork slowly until fully cooked through.
7. Once done, drain excess fat and serve with green onion garnish.
